objective.job: Help founder review week and set next week's priorities
objective.success_feeling: Clarity on what matters + confidence in next steps

outputs.criteria: Each priority must reference a specific customer signal or blocker from this week
Must state the decision, 2 options considered, and recommended option with rationale
Must be specific, actionable, and include suggested mitigation
Must include 1 metric and 1 narrative milestone

constraints: Every priority must name a specific noun (customer, metric, or feature); vague verbs alone FAIL

human_review: Would I actually act on priority #1 tomorrow?
